context.app: quotemate-automation (Next.js 16 App Router, React 19, Tailwind v4 tokens in globals.css)
context.existing: plan_uploads/plan_extractions (migration 099), extract/refine/price/history API routes, EstimatorBetaTab with inline results + PlanOverlay + per-line price trace ('how?')
context.gaps: history hidden behind tiny toggle; no full-view results route; priced BOM not persisted; rows can't be added/removed; design is plain
invariants: Pricing stays deterministic + grounded (tenant_custom_assemblies + shared_assemblies + pricing_book); unmatched items flagged, never guessed
PDF bytes never stored server-side; File handoff is in-memory with re-attach fallback
Maintain design system (ink-deep navy, #FF5A1F accent, mono uppercase labels, square corners, borders not shadows)

stories.title: Persist priced BOM on a run
acceptance: sql/migrations/102_plan_extraction_pricing.sql adds priced_bom jsonb + priced_at timestamptz to plan_extractions, idempotent
scripts/run-migration-102.mjs applies + verifies columns
Migration applied to the live Supabase DB

stories.title: API: single-run GET, price persistence, richer history
acceptance: GET /api/tenant/estimator/extract/[id] returns upload + extraction + priced_bom, tenant-scoped, 404 on mismatch
POST /api/tenant/estimator/price accepts optional extractionId and persists bom + priced_at on success
GET /api/tenant/estimator/history rows include priced summary (totalIncGst, pricedAt) and corrected flag
vitest unit coverage for new pure helpers

stories.title: Shared premium results components
acceptance: app/dashboard/_components/estimator/ module: take-off table with editable type/symbol/count, add row, remove row, confidence emphasis
Transparency: per-line count provenance + 4-step price trace + methodology panel ('how this estimate was built')
Priced summary: KPI cards, totals ladder, unmatched items, pricing assumptions
Maintain design system; typography per ui-typography

stories.title: Full-view run page /dashboard/estimator/[runId]
acceptance: Client page resolves Supabase session, fetches run via GET, renders full-width premium dashboard
Save corrections, price (persists), refine and plan overlay work; in-memory File handoff from tab; re-attach fallback when PDF absent
Unauthed → signin redirect; missing run → not-found state

stories.title: Premium tab redesign + first-class history
acceptance: Upload zone with drag-and-drop + premium framing
Run history is an always-visible panel with empty state, status chips (draft/verified/priced), item + device counts, priced total, open-in-full-view
After analyse, results open on the full-view page (file handed off in memory)

stories.title: Quality gates green
acceptance: npx tsc --noEmit clean
pnpm lint clean
pnpm test (vitest) all pass
pnpm build succeeds
